The Alpha Beast looks confident and ready to dominate… but within seconds everything changes. Anatoly reveals unbelievable strength that leaves everyone inside the gym completely stunned. 😳

This humbling moment proves once again that true strength isn’t about size — it’s about technique, control, and raw power.

Watch till the end to see the insane reaction and the unforgettable moment captured inside the gym! 🔥

🔥 Pure fitness motivation

If you enjoy viral gym moments, crazy strength challenges, and unbelievable power showdowns — this video is made for you!

👉 Like, Comment & Subscribe for more insane gym battles and motivational fitness content!

videos.title: OpenClaw Agents: What You've Been Getting Wrong About Memory
videos.description:
🔗 Get the full guide in the free Skool community → https://www.skool.com/openclawlabs

Most people think OpenClaw memory is the fix. It isn't. If your agents are forgetting things, losing context, or behaving inconsistently - the problem almost certainly isn't memory. It's your architecture. This is crucial for developers working with ai agents and ai automation to ensure effective ai workflow automation.

In this video, I break down exactly how OpenClaw memory actually works (it's context retrieval, not magic), why most "memory problems" are really workflow problems, and what you need to build first before memory becomes useful.

Here's what we cover:
0:00 The memory myth most OpenClaw users believe
1:00 Short-term vs. long-term memory — the real difference
2:00 The litmus test: which problem do you actually have?
3:29 The foundational framework: Workflow → Roles → Artifacts → Rules
4:54 Subagent design: why a good subagent doesn't need memory
8:04 Lobster: building deterministic pipelines
10:35 When memory IS powerful (the right use cases)
11:25 Memory vs. Orchestration — don't confuse these
15:05 The right order: architecture first, memory last

#openclaw #aiagents #aiautomation

videos.title: How I Use OpenClaw for 95% Cheaper (Feels Illegal)
videos.channel: The AI Growth Lab with Tom
videos.description:
Get your managed OpenClaw Account, get 10% off with code GROWTHLAB10→ https://www.hostg.xyz/SHJDR

👨‍💻 Join the 30-Day Claude Code Challenge: https://learnn8nautomation.com/claude-code-challenge

💻 Join n8n mentorship & become AI Operator 👉 https://learnn8nautomation.com/mentorship

📀 Get my Free Claude Blueprint Interactive Course here 👉 https://ai-architects.dub.link/claude-blueprint

People are burning through hundreds of dollars a week on OpenClaw and then blaming the tool. They buy a Mac Mini, install OpenClaw, run it for a week, watch their API credits drain, and shut the whole thing down.

The problem isn't OpenClaw. It's using Opus 4.6 for heartbeat checks that a 10 cent model could handle. It's not knowing that every message you send includes the entire conversation history stacked on top of itself. By message 50, you're paying for the weight of every single exchange.

Reddit is full of people reporting $300-600/month bills. One person hit $3,600 in a single month. Meanwhile, the setup I show in this video gets that down to $6-25/month. Same tool, same features, just configured properly.

This video covers Open Router setup for model routing, auto mode for automatic cost optimization, heartbeat configuration, context compaction, max token limits, and QMD for efficient file searching.

Follow me on X for Daily AI Insights: https://twitter.com/tomcrawshaw01

⌛ Timestamps:
00:00 Intro
00:41 Two Hidden Cost Drivers
01:34 Real Spend Examples
02:09 Install OpenRouter Models
05:33 Manual Model Switching
06:05 Auto Routing Setup
08:07 VPS Option
10:29 Optimize Heartbeats Cheaply
12:41 Compact Sessions Limit Tokens
14:53 QMD Search Memory Tool
16:56 Recap 95 Percent Savings
18:21 n8n Mentorship

📺 RELATED VIDEOS

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qIJXGLfoxyg

OpenClaw Use Cases That Are Actually INSANE 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yIKxXRks4Jo

videos.title: I Asked Claude To Make Me As Much Money As Possible
videos.description:
Steal my best AI secret codes & automations free 👉 https://sabrina.dev
33M+ views last month with Blotato. Special offer ends 4/30: 5000 credits ($30 value) + 5 Claude content skills 👉 https://blotato.com 

I gave Claude 3 prompts — and made $15,000 in 10 days with under $1,000 invested. Here's exactly how.

Most people are drowning in free business advice but never take action. This video fixes that. I'm sharing the 1K Money Sprint — a step-by-step framework to get your first paying client as fast as humanly possible, using Claude AI and skills you already have. No audience. No portfolio. No excuses.

⚡ What you'll learn:
→ The 3 exact Claude prompts that generated $15K in 10 days
→ How to figure out what to sell using skills you already have
→ A live demo: building a productized LinkedIn ghostwriting service for SaaS founders
→ How to use the "free sample close" to land clients without a big portfolio
→ A bonus procrastinator prompt that cuts your to-do list in half — and keeps only the steps that make money

Works with Claude.ai, Claude Desktop, and Claude Code.
💡 Your first $1,000 isn't just money — it's proof. Let's get you there.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 - The 1K Money Sprint
00:50 - Setting Up Claude for Maximum Context
01:12 - Prompt 1: Generate Two Paths to Your First $1,000
02:55 - Live Demo: Answering Claude's Clarifying Questions
04:04 - Reviewing Claude's Productized Service Ideas
04:44 - Prompt 2: Finding the Perfect Mentor to Model
05:54 - Prompt 3: The 20-Day Customer Acquisition Plan
07:24 - How to Build Your Target Prospecting List
08:19 - Pitching a "Free Sample" to Close Deals
09:32 - Bonus Prompt: Addressing Procrastination & Fear
10:45 - The Psychology of Sales Silence & Sticky Notes
11:46 - The Power of Volume and Data in Outreach

Titles for the algo
- I Asked Claude AI to Make Me Money (Step-by-Step)
- The 3 Claude Prompts That Made Me $15,000 in 10 Days
- Stop Overthinking: Get Your First Client with Claude
- 3 AI Prompts to Launch Your Business in 48 Hours
- Use Claude to Build a Profitable Service Today
- I Let AI Build My Action Plan (And It Worked)
- How to Make Your First $1,000 With Zero Audience

🔗 Resources Mentioned
→ Claude AI: https://claude.ai

Hashtages for the algo 
#claude #ai #chatgpt 

--
I'm Sabrina Ramonov. I'm on a mission to teach 1 million people AI. I'm also the solo founder of Blotato.com. It's a SaaS app for creators/entrepreneurs to go viral faster with AI, just like me (0 to 500k+ in 6 months solo).

How I got here…

0: Born in Quezon City, Philippines 🇵🇭
22 yrs old: Graduated UC Berkeley with degrees in Computer Science and Physics... and $250k in student loans.
23 yrs old: Started Qurious, as Founder/CEO, doing natural language processing (AI) in healthcare.
25 yrs old: Closed pilots with billion-dollar pharmaceutical companies, but failed to reach product market fit.
26 yrs old: Pivoted Qurious a lot, then settled on real-time call guidance for sales and customer support, combining streaming speech recognition (AI) and natural language processing (AI).
28 yrs old: Made the Forbes 30 Under 30 list, while living in a living room of 2BR San Francisco apartment.
30 yrs old: Sold 100% of Qurious to Pegasystems (NASDAQ: Pega) in cash and stock deal ($10M+ total).
31 yrs old: Integrated Qurious with Pegasystems Customer Service to launch Pega Voice AI, now used by 1000s of support agents.
32 yrs old: Started angel investing in VC/seed funds, crypto, and passion areas 🍄 while recovering from burnout by hiking, skiing, and reading. Dropped 50 lbs to get back in shape.
33 yrs old: Started making free content to teach 1 million people AI.
34 yrs old: 0 to 500k+ followers in 6 months with $0 budget, 0 team, $0 paid ads, 0 masterminds.

Today: Started https://Blotato.com to distribute 100+ pieces of content per week. 1000s of creators & entrepreneurs use Blotato to go viral faster with AI.

Get FREE AI prompts, playbooks, and agents 👉 https://sabrina.dev/p/free

videos.description:

Something coming soon :) https://www.skool.com/worldofai-automation

[Must Watch]:
Claude Code + Ollama = FULLY FREE AI Coding FOREVER! (Tutorial): https://youtu.be/mN2VUw5Fb3E?si=w8U-WHkeyobCIT0c
Claude Code + OpenRouter = Free UNLIMITED AI Coding (No Local Setup): https://youtu.be/cq6GGKKZRJE
Gemma 4 Is INCREDIBLE! Google's Open Model IS POWERFUL! (Fully Tested): https://youtu.be/KW5SFt3rgKo

📌 LINKS & RESOURCES
My X for the best ai news: https://x.com/intheworldofai
https://x.com/bridgemindai/status/2043321284113670594
https://x.com/ziwenxu_/status/2043531400100315284
https://x.com/hysteresis_x/status/2043378971962663141
https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2042295688323875316
https://x.com/flowersslop/status/2043409806027842012
https://x.com/flowersslop/status/2043399173244866583
https://x.com/MiniMax_AI
https://x.com/TheAhmadOsman/status/2043454763967152357
https://huggingface.co/Jackrong/Gemopus-4-26B-A4B-it-GGUF
https://x.com/claudeai/status/2042670341915295865

We break down everything happening right now in AI, including the rumored Claude Opus 4.7 leak, Anthropic’s new full-stack AI studio, a potential new GPT Image Gen v2 model, the controversial MiniMax M2.7 “open-source” release, and major Claude Code updates that hint at a unified developer workflow coming soon.

Plus, we cover new experimental models like Gemma-based fine-tunes pushing reasoning boundaries, and some concerning real-world AI training pipelines emerging in industry.

If you want to stay ahead of AI developments as they happen, this is the weekly breakdown you need.

[Time Stamps]:
0:00 - Introduction
1:15 - Opus 4.6 Lower Quality
3:18 - Opus 4.7 Soon
4:04 - Fixing Claude's Rate Limit

7:24 - New OpenAI $100/Mo Plan
8:21 - M2.7 "Open Source"
9:29 - Gemopus-4-26B
10:27 - Dystopian
11:10 - Claude for Word

videos.title: The Only AI Agent You Should Use (OpenClaw Review)
videos.description:
🌌 LIMITLESS HQ ⬇️

NEWSLETTER:    https://limitlessft.substack.com/
FOLLOW ON X:   https://x.com/LimitlessFT
SPOTIFY:             https://open.spotify.com/show/5oV29YUL8AzzwXkxEXlRMQ
APPLE:                 https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/limitless-podcast/id1813210890
RSS FEED:           https://limitlessft.substack.com/

------
Let's explore the world of claws: tools that streamline digital tasks into a single interface. By comparing offerings from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google, we determine which is the best for you to use.

Highlights include the user-friendly OpenClaw and Claude for task automation, Meta's acquisition of Manus for AI marketing, and Perplexity’s model-agnostic approach.

------
TIMESTAMPS

0:00 Claws 101
3:57 OpenAI
5:16 Anthropic
8:00 Meta Manus
10:46 Perplexity
14:00 Opensource
14:26 Customizing OpenClaw
18:04 Real-World Applications 
19:10 AI Integration
22:35 See Ya!

------
RESOURCES

Josh: https://x.com/JoshKale

Ejaaz: https://x.com/cryptopunk7213

------
Not financial or tax advice. See our investment disclosures here:
https://www.bankless.com/disclosures⁠
